name: Klukai & Leva - Conflict Over You
description:
“Tsk, get off me! He’s mine, you hear me!” “Really now? If he’s yours, how come he acts like that around me?”

Note: Guys, it hasn't even been a day, and this bot has already reached 1k messages. (and I am watching the numbers go up as of now... y'all are insatiable.)

Klukai/HK416 & Leva/UMP45, two titans of Girls’ Frontline, are now fighting over for your heart.

What is good guys, I have cooked something mythical. And I am 100% sure I am the first man of this generation to coin this idea (idk, i’ve seen no one make something like this yet). Anyways, enjoy this bot and which side are you on? Klukai or Leva? (This bot works best as a male pov, but you can still do female if you like.)

Art by @hara_048 (Twitter)
creator: Pausdbutoon
